title: 4 Payment Stocks Likely to Maintain Winning Streak in 2024
text: Payment stocks like MA, V, AXP, and GPN are expected to reap the benefits of resilient consumer spending and a stable labor market. However, regulatory challenges and high costs might hamper the results.

title: Report: Global Payments Considering Acquisition of Shift4 Payments
text: Global Payments, a payments company based in Atlanta, is reportedly considering an acquisition of Shift4 Payments, a provider of an end-to-end commerce solutions headquartered in Allentown, Pennsylvania.  The company has been working with an advisor to assess the feasibility of a potential deal with Shift4, Bloomberg reported Thursday (Dec. 14) citing unnamed sources.

title: Shift4 Stock Jumps On Report Global Payments Is Mulling Acquisition
text: FOUR stock jumped late Thursday on a report from Bloomberg that Global Payments is considering acquiring Shift4 Payments.

title: 4 Top Tech Stocks to Buy and 3 to Stay Far Away From
text: Tech stocks are tricky now because the technology market is in a state of flux. This year brought a big reset for tech stocks after record sales for many product categories in 2021 and 2022.

title: Global Payments: A Stable Performer Amid Uncertain Macroeconomic Environment
text: Over the past three years, shares of Global Payments have descended from their all-time highs. GPN is a leading payment technology provider with solid fundamentals. Valuation suggests the company's shares are undervalued.

title: Global Payments: Get Your Wallet Out For This Undervalued Company
text: Global Payments is a well-placed company in the high-growth fintech payment space. Cash Flow Returns On Investments DCF valuation shows the company is trading at a 50% discount to warranted value. GPN has experienced historical growth and is expected to continue growing, with improving margins and increasing returns.
